summary: Comprehensive Niri review completed. Current setup is well-configured with GNOME integration. Key upgrades available: xwayland-satellite (X11 compat), floating windows (25.01+), kanshi (monitor management), prefer-no-csd with shadows, enhanced window rules. GNOME compatibility already excellent for dual-session use.

artifacts.summary: Research report covering Niri 2025 features, missing components (xwayland-satellite, kanshi), configuration enhancements (floating windows, shadows, corner radius), window rules for common apps, and Waybar improvements while maintaining GNOME compatibility
